description: A wide graphic with a red-to-blue gradient background and a faint Department of Homeland Security seal watermark. The DHS seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the upper left. Bold white serif text reads DHS Ends Automatic Extension of Employment Authorization, with an italic subhead reading New rule prioritizes vetting and screening to protect public safety and national security.
notable_text: DHS Ends Automatic Extension of Employment Authorization; New rule prioritizes vetting and screening to protect public safety and national security
